description: A domain element: a logical grouping of functionality (C4 "container (logical)").

description.description: What functionality this domain groups and why.

links.description: Cross-references to other artifacts or docs: exactly one {<linkType>: <pathRef>} pair per entry, plus an optional cardinality key ({from, to, label?}). Path refs must start with "~/" or "@workspace/".

propertyNames.description: The link type, e.g. "adr", "runbook" — or "cardinality" for the optional cardinality key.

source.description: Freeform provenance note: how or where this artifact was sourced from.

tags.description: Free-text labels for filtering and grouping.

title: WorkSpec C4 Domain (v1alpha1)
